resources.string:
Healthy Recipes

1. Fruit Salad 
A mix of fresh fruits like bananas, apples and oranges.

2. Grilled Chicken 
Low-fat grilled chicken served with vegetables.

3. Vegetable Stir fry
Carrots, broccoli and pepper cooked lightly.

4. Oatmeal Breakfast
Oats with milk and fruits.

5. Avocado Toast
Whole grain bread topped with avocado.

6. Boiled Eggs
Rich in protein and easy to prepare.

7. Smoothie Bowl
Blended fruits with yoghurt and nuts.

8. Brown Rice and Beans
Healthy and full of fiber.

9. Baked Fish
Fish baked with lemon and spices.

10. Greek Yoghurt with Honey
Good for digestion and very nutritious.

Advice:

1. Hydration first — Drink plenty of water, unsweetened tea, or black coffee. Limit sugary drinks and alcohol.

2. Build balanced meals — Include protein + fiber-rich veggies + healthy fat for satiety.

3. Limit added sugars — Keep under 10% of daily calories (ideally much less). Avoid sugary beverages entirely.

4. Read labels — Watch for hidden sugars, sodium, and ultra-processed ingredients.

5. Meal prep smartly — Batch-cook proteins and veggies. Keep healthy snacks (nuts, fruit, yogurt) accessible.

6. Eat mindfully — Pay attention to hunger/fullness cues. Enjoy meals without distractions when possible.

7. Stay active — Pair nutrition with movement (150+ minutes moderate activity per week for adults).
